Mission.headline: Nature. Comfort.
Mission.description: An authentic Brazilian Sitio with 2.6 hectares of nature. Pool, BBQ, offroad trails, and complete privacy. Your refuge away from the city.

Thesis.title: Why Girassol
Thesis.subtitle: A meticulously designed harmony between cozy comfort and the vibrant soul of wild nature.
Thesis.natureDesc: Active preservation and direct contact with the local ecosystem. Feel the pulse of the forest at every sunrise.
Thesis.comfortDesc: Premium suites with original design and organic materials, created for your absolute relaxation and regeneration.
Thesis.experienceDesc: Curated exclusive moments, from sustainable fine dining to private exploration itineraries.

Location.description: Located in the countryside of São Roque, a few minutes from the best markets and local conveniences. 60 km from São Paulo.

CookieConsent.title: Cookies and privacy
CookieConsent.message: We use Google Analytics and Meta Pixel cookies to improve your experience and measure our ad performance. By accepting, you agree to the use of these cookies.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: Sítio Girassol (sitiogirassol.org) respects your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, why, and how you can exercise your rights under the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD) and applicable international regulations.
Privacy.dataCollectedBody:
We do not collect personal data directly (name, email, phone). Our site uses analytics tools that automatically collect:

• IP address (anonymized)
• Device type and browser
• Pages visited and browsing time
• Traffic source (search, social media, direct links)
Privacy.purposeBody:
The collected data is used exclusively to:

• Measure site performance and improve visitor experience
• Evaluate the effectiveness of advertising campaigns
• Understand how visitors interact with our content
Privacy.thirdPartiesBody:
Browsing data is shared with:

• Google Analytics 4 (Google LLC) — site traffic analysis
• Meta Pixel (Meta Platforms, Inc.) — ad conversion measurement
• Vercel Analytics (Vercel Inc.) — performance monitoring (no cookies)

Each service has its own privacy policy and processes data according to its respective terms.
Privacy.cookiesBody:
Analytics and advertising cookies (Google Analytics and Meta Pixel) are only activated after your explicit consent, given through the banner displayed on your first visit. Essential cookies for site functionality and Vercel Analytics (which does not use cookies) operate without requiring consent.

You can change your preference at any time by clearing your browser cookies and revisiting the site.
Privacy.rightsBody:
Under the LGPD and applicable privacy laws, you have the right to:

• Know what data is being collected
• Request deletion of your data
• Revoke consent at any time
• Request information about data sharing with third parties

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us.
Privacy.contactBody:
For privacy-related questions, contact us:

WhatsApp: +55 (11) 91158-4094
Instagram: @sitiogirassol.sp

Data controller: Sítio Girassol, São Roque, SP, Brazil.
